response.global_summary: The video features a virtual idol concert performance of the song "Dokidoki Kyun! de Daibousou♡". The performance involves a group of virtual idols dancing and singing on a stage, with a dialogue segment at the beginning and the musical performance starting around 01:25.

scenes.description: Two virtual characters, Kobo Kanaeru and another character, have a dialogue scene on stage.
The song "Dokidoki Kyun! de Daibousou♡" begins with a group of virtual characters dancing and singing on stage. The song title appears on-screen in the lower third area.
scenes.song_title: どきどきキュン!で大暴走♡
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
♡どきどきキュン!♡ 送るラブビーム 
君を夢中にさせる恋の味! 
何とかしなくちゃならなくて 
突然メイドになっちゃって 
いつものように お店の掃除 
扉 開いちゃって目が合った 

何だかじゅわ～しなくなっちゃって 
突然メイドになっちゃって 
あわてんぼうにもなっちゃって 
お仕事中にも おしにむちゅうに 
たかわせがしても見当たらないじゃん 
もう一回 ちょっと待って 
もういいよ 秘密だよね 
もういいの 好きになっちゃって 
ねぇ 好きって言って 
どきどききょうおくるラブビーム 
君も夢中にさせる魔法じゃん 
ほらどきどききゅん 
わたしだいぼうそう 
君を夢中にさせる恋の味 
ひとつどうぞこれが恋の味
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: (Rough translation: ♡Dokidoki Kyun!♡ Sending a love beam, the taste of love that makes you crazy! I have to do something, I suddenly became a maid, cleaning the shop as usual, the door opened, and our eyes met. / I don't know what to do, it's a bit chaotic, I became a maid, I don't know what to do, it's a bit chaotic, I'm waiting for work, I'm waiting for the push, even if I look for it, I can't find it anywhere. / Wait a minute, it's a secret, you know, I'm falling in love, I'm confused, it's magic that we can be crazy about each other, so you are, falling in love with a heart-pounding sensation, here's one for you, this is the taste of love.)

scenes.description: The performance ends, and a character addresses the audience.
